mapper.select: SELECT t.SPUUID, t.RKRQ FROM gh_jf t WHERE #{jsrqStart} <= T.JSRQ AND T.JSRQ <= #{jsrqEnd} AND t.JSBJ IN ('Y', 'T', 'W', 'V', 'F', 'C') AND HKPCH IS NULL
SELECT * FROM schbwj t WHERE #{jsrqStart} <= t.JSRQ AND t.JSRQ <= #{jsrqEnd}
SELECT MAX(t.HKPCH) HKPCH FROM gh_jf t WHERE t.JSBJ IN ('Y', 'T', 'W') AND LEFT (T.HKPCH , 8) = #{dqrq}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gh_hkxx (HKPCH, XH, LX, ZH, HH, JE, DEPT_ID, DZ, FY, JYM, THBJ, SCBZ, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, HM, BZ) VALUES
(#{item.hkpch}, #{item.xh}, #{item.lx}, #{item.zh}, #{item.hh}, #{item.je}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.dz}, #{item.fy}, #{item.jym}, #{item.thbj}, #{item.scbz}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.hm}, #{item.bz})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM gh_qsjshkrj T WHERE T.LX = '1' AND T.RKRQ IN
#{item}
